summary_en: 72,115,300 shares (2.6% of outstanding) at ¥150.0B maximum. ToSTNeT-3 placement on May 27, 2026, 08:45 JST. Settlement and results announcement immediately after trading close. Part of broader 100M share / ¥150B authorization (May 18, 2026 – March 31, 2027); unfilled balance to pursue open-market purchases through March 31, 2027.
title_en: Notice of Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
Japan Post Holdings announced on May 26, 2026 the execution of a block share repurchase via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading, scheduled for May 27, 2026 at 08:45 JST. The block targets up to 72,115,300 shares (2.6% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) with a maximum expenditure of ¥150.0 billion, at the May 26 closing price of ¥2,080 per share. Results will be published immediately after the trading window closes.

This block is the first tranche of a broader board-authorized repurchase program approved on May 15, 2026, permitting acquisition of up to 100 million shares (3.6% of outstanding) for ¥150 billion over the period from May 18, 2026 through March 31, 2027. Should the ToSTNeT-3 placement not consume the full authorized amount, Japan Post intends to execute the unfilled balance through open-market purchases by March 31, 2027.

The company notes it has not yet confirmed whether the Finance Minister (the controlling shareholder) will participate in the repurchase, but expects participation based on the privatization law framework.
